description: Full-stack developer and system admin. Building performant Svelte/React web apps and robust, self-hosted Linux server infrastructure.

hero.title: Backend-focused Developer
hero.p1: I build web apps and dev tools that actually work. I prefer solid backend architecture and clean logic over over-engineered UI design.
hero.p2: I’ve taught myself everything I know by just building stuff—from scaling a tool for FridaysForFuture to managing my own Linux server infrastructure.
hero.p3: Currently tinkering with server automation and backend systems. I just want to make my server-infrastructure more reliable.

item_1.name: plakatiertool
item_1.description: A full-stack mapping app built for FFF to track poster locations at scale. I implemented a permission system that masks exact coordinates for guest users, ensuring location security. The PWA architecture ensures easy usage, making it reliable for field use by activists.

item_2.name: oeffimonitor
item_2.description: A public transport dashboard I adapted to switch from the WienerLinien API to the Verbundlinie TRIAS API. It features a Node.js backend that handles data caching and OSRM for dynamic walking-time calculations, designed to run on a Raspberry Pi.

item_3.name: valeskini.co.at
item_3.description: A performance-optimized migration of a legacy CMS-based site. I rebuilt the platform from the ground up using React and custom CSS, replacing bloated CMS overhead with a clean, maintainable component structure. The site is self-hosted on a performance-tuned Linux environment to minimize latency.

item_4.name: quackpic.at
item_4.description: A self-hosted image hosting platform I started building at age 12. While the codebase is admittedly a 'legacy' snapshot of my early days and the CSS is questionable, the Node.js backend has proven to be surprisingly stable, handling file uploads and database management efficiently for years without downtime.

item_1.description: Managing administrative workflows with a focus on ERP systems. Gaining practical insights into internal IT departments and technical support processes.

item_2.description: Focused on CS fundamentals, hardware architecture, and systems engineering. Specialized in technical implementation and hands-on problem solving in IT projects.

item_3.description: Developed and maintained custom software for internal data management. Responsible for IT administration and organizing large-scale technical operations.

item_4.description: Building and maintaining a private server infrastructure. Implementing and managing services like Nextcloud, Proxmox, and Mailcow to master Linux environments.

typescript.title: TypeScript & Node.js
typescript.description: Async I/O, RESTful APIs, type-safe backend logic

react.title: ReactJS
react.description: SPA architecture, legacy migration, component hooks

linux.title: Linux & Admin
linux.description: Server maintenance, SSH, CLI workflows, permissions

java.title: Java & Kotlin
java.description: Minecraft modding, plugin development, JVM basics
